scripts.optimize:loading-bg: node -e "const sharp = require('sharp'); const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const input = path.join(__dirname, 'public', 'loading-bg.jpg'); const output = path.join(__dirname, 'public'); async function run() { await sharp(input).resize(1920, 1920, { fit: 'cover', withoutEnlargement: true }).avif({ quality: 75, effort: 6 }).toFile(path.join(output, 'loading-bg.avif')); await sharp(input).resize(1920, 1920, { fit: 'cover', withoutEnlargement: true }).webp({ quality: 80 }).toFile(path.join(output, 'loading-bg.webp')); console.log('✅ Loading background image optimized'); } run().catch(err => { console.error('Error:', err.message); process.exit(1); })"
